notes.authEliminated: Supabase Auth fully eliminated; runtime_users is sole identity source
notes.runtimeIsolation: 2026-05-28 — Phase 1: guest fallback root cause fixed — subscriber awaits hydrateIdentity then initRuntime + refreshActionSheet. Generation-gated subscriber prevents identity leakage. Subscriber _unsub captured, teardown cleans up. Registered after boot to avoid leak on crash.
notes.uiAuthorityFix: 2026-05-28 — _renderButton() uses resolveProfile() instead of getSession(). _openSheet() uses profile.id !== 'guest'. Single runtime authority source.
notes.navHub: 2026-05-28 — Profile items refactored: universal عملائي (customers) and فواتيري (invoices) appear in every authenticated account's action sheet. role-specific items separated from universal items from role actions. Guest untouched.
notes.pricingRpc: 2026-05-28 — Migration 008 created: runtime_product_prices view (canonical pricing projection) + resolve_product_prices_batch RPC with customer tier resolution. Run via node run_migration.js
notes.verificationScript: 2026-05-28 — runtime_verification.mjs written. Covers: login/hydration (all 6 accounts), refresh, logout/login switch, pricing fallback, hash storm, suspend/resume. Requires Playwright + dev server.
